gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/154)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/154)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِنِّي أَراكُمْ بِخَيْرٍ قَالَ كَانَ سِعْرُهُمْ رَخِيصاً .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from one of his companions, raising it,
‘Regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [11:84] surely I see you with properity, heasws said: ‘Their prices used to be low’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from certain persons of his people in a marfu’ manner’ who have said the following: “About the words of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, ‘I see you in goodness . . . [11:84] He (the Imam) said, ‘It is a reference to their prices.”
